mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_uploaded_asset ( owner_user_id, media_key, storage_provider, media_type, source_module ) VALUES ( #{ownerUserId}, #{mediaKey}, #{storageProvider}, #{mediaType}, #{sourceModule} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE owner_user_id = VALUES(owner_user_id), storage_provider = VALUES(storage_provider), media_type = VALUES(media_type), source_module = VALUES(source_module), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_uploaded_asset WHERE media_key = #{mediaKey} LIMIT 1
